column1: He (to turn) on the TV to watch cartoons every morning.
They (not to take) care of the garden next summer.
I (not to go) to the cinema tomorrow.
My friend (to know) Spanish ten years ago.
Pat (not to cook) dinner at the moment. She (to talk) on the phone now.
I (not to drink) coffee now. I (to write) an English exercise at the moment.
